property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk_21\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Python312\Scripts\;C:\Program Files\Python312\;C:\Java\jdk-21.0.10\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Apache\apache-maven-3.9.12\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Users\vigne\scoop\shims;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk_21\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Program Files\Python312\Scripts\;C:\Program Files\Python312;C:\Users\vigne\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\vigne\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\vigne\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\Android\Sdk\platform-tools;C:\Android\Sdk\cmdline-tools\latest\bin;;.

testcase.name: verifyAdditionWorkflow
testcase.system-out: Setting up device capabilities... Appium session created and Calculator opened! Executing math workflow: 5 + 5... Result retrieved from device screen: 10
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.

testcase.name: verifyDivisionWorkflow
testcase.system-out: Executing math workflow: 5 / 5... Result retrieved from device screen: 1

testcase.name: verifyMultiplicationWorkflow
testcase.system-out: Executing math workflow: 5 * 5... Result retrieved from device screen: 25

testcase.name: verifySubtractionWorkflow
testcase.system-out: Executing math workflow: 5 - 5... Result retrieved from device screen: 0
